creator: pphillips@experts-exchange.com
text:
Just a follow up:

The separate cake22/cake21 ports probably aren't needed given that 
CakePHP's migration guide states that CakePHP 2.2 is fully API 
compatible with 2.0/2.1.

A note in UPDATING with a link to the migration guide will suffice:
http://book.cakephp.org/2.0/en/appendices/2-2-migration-guide.html
